description_long: This is a tall, open-frame bookcase with a modern industrial design, featuring three wooden shelves supported by a black metal frame. The shelves are evenly spaced and have a rich, dark wood finish, providing ample storage or display space. The frame consists of two vertical metal supports on each side, connected at the top and bottom, giving the structure stability and a geometric aesthetic. The side profile reveals that the shelves are set at a slight angle, with the frame leaning backward, adding a contemporary touch. The back of the bookcase is open, allowing for visibility and access from both the front and rear. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or modern apartments.
description: A tall, open-frame bookcase with three dark wood shelves and a black metal frame, featuring a modern industrial design and angled side supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced wooden shelves framed by black metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled, leaning frame and the depth of the wooden shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with open access and visible shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the angled frame and shelf arrangement.
